TEXT.source: NTU Corpus stories for Tsou, story: TsouNr-pear-An
TEXT.citation: Sung, L. M., Lily, I., Hsieh, F., & Lin, Z. (2008). Developing an online corpus of Formosan languages. Taiwan Journal of Linguistics, 6(2.).
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @article{sung2008developing,title={Developing an online corpus of Formosan languages.},author={Sung, Li-May and Lily, I and Hsieh, Fuhui and Lin, Zhemin and others},journal={Taiwan Journal of Linguistics},volume={6},number={2},year={2008}}

S.FORM: pan to moso la eahioa ho notfʉngʉ emʉm'ʉ to lea 'o'oanʉ.
S.PHON: pan to moso ɗa eahioa ho notfɨŋɨ emɨmʔɨ to ɗea ʔoʔoanɨ.
S.FORM: pan to moso la eahioa ho notfʉngʉ emʉm'ʉ to lea 'o'oanʉ.
S.PHON: pan to moso ɗa eahioa ho notfɨŋɨ emɨmʔɨ to ɗea ʔoʔoanɨ.
S.TRANSL: 有一個人在工作,專注於種植吃的東西.
There existed one that was working and specialized in the planting of foods.

S.FORM: moso uh to lasi ezoeʉ 'o mameoi ho toa to isi mʉ'a ci la ana ci macucuma.
S.PHON: moso uh to ɗasi ezoeɨ ʔo mameoi ho toa to isi mɨʔa ʦi ɗa ana ʦi maʦuʦuma.
S.FORM: moso uh to lasi ezoeʉ 'o mameoi ho toa to isi mʉ'a ci la ana ci macucuma.
S.PHON: moso uh to ɗasi ezoeɨ ʔo mameoi ho toa to isi mɨʔa ʦi ɗa ana ʦi maʦuʦuma.
S.TRANSL: 老人去他的田裡採他種的可食的作物.
That old man went to his field and picked the crops/eaten stuff that he planted.

S.FORM: micu aomomane panto mo esmi ci mo eakako' to eangi.
S.PHON: miʦu aomomane panto mo esmi ʦi mo eakakoʔ to eaŋi.
S.FORM: micu aomomane panto mo esmi ci mo eakako' to eangi.
S.PHON: miʦu aomomane panto mo esmi ʦi mo eakakoʔ to eaŋi.
S.TRANSL: 不久,來了一個牽著羊的人.
After a while, there came one that pulled a goat.

S.FORM: micu eupepeahngʉeʉ eainca aveoveoyʉ ho mo na'no euho'a 'e eh macucumasu.
S.PHON: miʦu eupepeahŋɨeɨ eainʦa aveoveojɨ ho mo naʔno euhoʔa ʔe eh maʦuʦumasu.
S.FORM: micu eupepeahngʉeʉ eainca aveoveoyʉ ho mo na'no euho'a 'e eh macucumasu.
S.PHON: miʦu eupepeahŋɨeɨ eainʦa aveoveojɨ ho mo naʔno euhoʔa ʔe eh maʦuʦumasu.

TRANSL.notes: (他)跟(採果的人)打招呼說,真棒,你的作物長的真好.

S.TRANSL: 跟 打招呼說,真棒,你的作物長的真好.
And he exchanged greetings by saying, "Great! Your crops are well-fruited.

S.FORM: aomane micu eon to jidens 'o okosi ho meecunu.
S.PHON: aomane miʦu eon to ji*ens ʔo okosi ho meeʦunu.
S.FORM: aomane micu eon to jidens 'o okosi ho meecunu.
S.PHON: aomane miʦu eon to ji*ens ʔo okosi ho meeʦunu.

TRANSL.notes: 不久,他的小孩在自行車上趕上(他).

S.TRANSL: 不久,他的小孩在自行車上趕上 .

TRANSL.notes: It was after a while and his child (=the boy) on the bike caught up with him.

S.TRANSL: It was after a while and his child on the bike caught up with him.

S.FORM: micu cono skaeu 'o isi sia to jidensasi ho maine'e.
S.PHON: miʦu ʦono skaeu ʔo isi sia to ji*ensasi ho maineʔe.
S.FORM: micu cono skaeu 'o isi sia to jidensasi ho maine'e.
S.PHON: miʦu ʦono skaeu ʔo isi sia to ji*ensasi ho maineʔe.
S.TRANSL: 他放一籃水果在他自行車上,回去了.

TRANSL.notes: And then it was a basket (of the fruit) that he loaded onto his bike and he went home.

S.TRANSL: And then it was a basket that he loaded onto his bike and he went home.

S.FORM: eupteʉlʉ to ceonʉ 'o oko no mamespingi ci mo mae maezo eon to jidensa.
S.PHON: eupteɨɗɨ to ʦeonɨ ʔo oko no mamespiŋi ʦi mo mae maezo eon to ji*ensa.
S.FORM: eupteʉlʉ to ceonʉ 'o oko no mamespingi ci mo mae maezo eon to jidensa.
S.PHON: eupteɨɗɨ to ʦeonɨ ʔo oko no mamespiŋi ʦi mo mae maezo eon to ji*ensa.

TRANSL.notes: 在路上(他)遇到一個也是騎腳踏車的女孩.

S.TRANSL: 在路上 遇到一個也是騎腳踏車的女孩.
Then on the way, a girl who was also riding a bike was encountered.

S.FORM: mo apemio mi'pou 'e oko no hahocngʉ.
S.PHON: mo apemio miʔpou ʔe oko no hahoʦŋɨ.
S.FORM: mo apemio mi'pou 'e oko no hahocngʉ.
S.PHON: mo apemio miʔpou ʔe oko no hahoʦŋɨ.

TRANSL.notes: (因為)那男孩太專注臉朝(女孩那)邊.

S.TRANSL: 那男孩太專注臉朝 邊.

TRANSL.notes: (Just because) the boy was devoted to side-looking (the girl).

S.TRANSL: the boy was devoted to side-looking .

S.FORM: mo smotokʉ to fatu 'o isi 'o jidensasi.
S.PHON: mo smotokɨ to fatu ʔo isi ʔo ji*ensasi.
S.FORM: mo smotokʉ to fatu 'o isi 'o jidensasi.
S.PHON: mo smotokɨ to fatu ʔo isi ʔo ji*ensasi.
S.TRANSL: 他的自行車碰到一塊石頭.
His bike bumped into a stone.

S.FORM: cu alʉ eain e'pueu ho mat'at'ango maezo.
S.PHON: ʦu aɗɨ eain eʔpueu ho matʔatʔaŋo maezo.
S.FORM: cu alʉ eain e'pueu ho mat'at'ango maezo.
S.PHON: ʦu aɗɨ eain eʔpueu ho matʔatʔaŋo maezo.
S.TRANSL: 他跌了個四腳朝天.
And he fell on all four legs in the ground.

S.FORM: miuhu 'o isi hafa ci ci 'o'oanʉ.
S.PHON: miuhu ʔo isi hafa ʦi ʦi ʔoʔoanɨ.
S.FORM: miuhu 'o isi hafa ci ci 'o'oanʉ.
S.PHON: miuhu ʔo isi hafa ʦi ʦi ʔoʔoanɨ.
S.TRANSL: 那些可以吃的東西都散開了.
And the eating stuff spilled.

S.FORM: mo panto mo esmi ci mo nanat'ot'ohaisa ci mo tueu ihe cu eaeza to'usni ho patmʉta 'o mo supepeohʉ ci la oanʉ.
S.PHON: mo panto mo esmi ʦi mo nanatʔotʔohaisa ʦi mo tueu ihe ʦu eaeza toʔusni ho patmɨta ʔo mo supepeohɨ ʦi ɗa oanɨ.
S.FORM: mo panto mo esmi ci mo nanat'ot'ohaisa ci mo tueu ihe cu eaeza to'usni ho patmʉta 'o mo supepeohʉ ci la oanʉ.
S.PHON: mo panto mo esmi ʦi mo nanatʔotʔohaisa ʦi mo tueu ihe ʦu eaeza toʔusni ho patmɨta ʔo mo supepeohɨ ʦi ɗa oanɨ.

TRANSL.notes: 三個男孩走過來幫(他)撿起散開的水果.

S.TRANSL: 三個男孩走過來幫 撿起散開的水果.
There arrived three brothers that helped him picked up the spilt fruits.

S.FORM: ho soip soo'veia to jidensasi.
S.PHON: ho soip sooʔveia to ji*ensasi.
S.FORM: ho soip soo'veia to jidensasi.
S.PHON: ho soip sooʔveia to ji*ensasi.

TRANSL.notes: 把(水果)放回他的自行車.

S.TRANSL: 把 放回他的自行車.
And put them back to his bike.

S.FORM: mo 'so smo'co'congo 'e 'e oko micu c'o poe'oha 'o jidensasi.
S.PHON: mo ʔso smoʔʦoʔʦoŋo ʔe ʔe oko miʦu ʦʔo poeʔoha ʔo ji*ensasi.
S.FORM: mo 'so smo'co'congo 'e 'e oko micu c'o poe'oha 'o jidensasi.
S.PHON: mo ʔso smoʔʦoʔʦoŋo ʔe ʔe oko miʦu ʦʔo poeʔoha ʔo ji*ensasi.
S.TRANSL: 男孩覺得很痛,只能推著他著自行車.
The child felt painful and could just push his bike.

S.FORM: micu mo'unu maita'e 'o mo to'usnu ci mo tueu.
S.PHON: miʦu moʔunu maitaʔe ʔo mo toʔusnu ʦi mo tueu.
S.FORM: micu mo'unu maita'e 'o mo to'usnu ci mo tueu.
S.PHON: miʦu moʔunu maitaʔe ʔo mo toʔusnu ʦi mo tueu.
S.TRANSL: 那三個男孩就這樣朝那邊走了.
The three went just like that.

S.FORM: ihe aiti 'o ceopngusi mo supeohʉ.
S.PHON: ihe aiti ʔo ʦeopŋusi mo supeohɨ.
S.FORM: ihe aiti 'o ceopngusi mo supeohʉ.
S.PHON: ihe aiti ʔo ʦeopŋusi mo supeohɨ.
S.TRANSL: 他們看到他的帽子掉下來.
They saw his hat fell.

S.FORM: micu meobango 'o mo cihi ho eoveineni.
S.PHON: miʦu meoɓaŋo ʔo mo ʦihi ho eoveineni.
S.FORM: micu meobango 'o mo cihi ho eoveineni.
S.PHON: miʦu meoɓaŋo ʔo mo ʦihi ho eoveineni.

TRANSL.notes: 其中一個男孩去追(那個男孩)並且還(帽子)給那個男孩

S.TRANSL: 其中一個男孩去追 並且還 給那個男孩

TRANSL.notes: One of the three chased (the boy) and returned it to the boy.

S.TRANSL: One of the three chased and returned it to the boy.

S.FORM: mo na'no kokaekaebʉ 'e oko ci moso smopcuku.
S.PHON: mo naʔno kokaekaeɓɨ ʔe oko ʦi moso smopʦuku.
S.FORM: mo na'no kokaekaebʉ 'e oko ci moso smopcuku.
S.PHON: mo naʔno kokaekaeɓɨ ʔe oko ʦi moso smopʦuku.
S.TRANSL: 之前跌倒的男孩非常高興.
The child who fell previously was then very happy.

S.FORM: isi cu fii to isi toveuca ci mo tueu ci eh la 'o'oanʉ.
S.PHON: isi ʦu fii to isi toveuʦa ʦi mo tueu ʦi eh ɗa ʔoʔoanɨ.
S.FORM: isi cu fii to isi toveuca ci mo tueu ci eh la 'o'oanʉ.
S.PHON: isi ʦu fii to isi toveuʦa ʦi mo tueu ʦi eh ɗa ʔoʔoanɨ.

TRANSL.notes: 他給(那三個小孩)三個食物(他們採的).

S.TRANSL: 他給 三個食物 .

TRANSL.notes: (The three boys) were given three foods (that were picked.)

S.TRANSL: were given three foods

S.FORM: micu mo'unu maita'e 'o mo tueu ci 'o'oko.
S.PHON: miʦu moʔunu maitaʔe ʔo mo tueu ʦi ʔoʔoko.
S.FORM: micu mo'unu maita'e 'o mo tueu ci 'o'oko.
S.PHON: miʦu moʔunu maitaʔe ʔo mo tueu ʦi ʔoʔoko.
S.TRANSL: 那三個小孩就那樣走了.
The three went away just like that.

S.FORM: isi ouhuhuca 'o isi a faeni ci mo tueu ci mo macoconi ci la 'o'oanʉ.
S.PHON: isi ouhuhuʦa ʔo isi a faeni ʦi mo tueu ʦi mo maʦoʦoni ʦi ɗa ʔoʔoanɨ.
S.FORM: isi ouhuhuca 'o isi a faeni ci mo tueu ci mo macoconi ci la 'o'oanʉ.
S.PHON: isi ouhuhuʦa ʔo isi a faeni ʦi mo tueu ʦi mo maʦoʦoni ʦi ɗa ʔoʔoanɨ.
S.TRANSL: 他們離開時,一面吃著那食物.
while they were walking away, they were eating the food.

S.FORM: micu es espopaeo to eh to mo toa to ihe 'o'oanʉ ci mameoi.
S.PHON: miʦu es espopaeo to eh to mo toa to ihe ʔoʔoanɨ ʦi mameoi.
S.FORM: micu es espopaeo to eh to mo toa to ihe 'o'oanʉ ci mameoi.
S.PHON: miʦu es espopaeo to eh to mo toa to ihe ʔoʔoanɨ ʦi mameoi.

TRANSL.notes: (那三個小孩)突然出現在老人採集食物那裡.

S.TRANSL: 突然出現在老人採集食物那裡.

TRANSL.notes: (The three) all of sudden appeared at the place where the old man gathered fruit.

S.TRANSL: all of sudden appeared at the place where the old man gathered fruit.

S.FORM: micu eu'sipeohʉ ho aiti isi eainca no koesi mais'a no mohcu la eus eusno skaeu o'u toveuca.
S.PHON: miʦu euʔsipeohɨ ho aiti isi eainʦa no koesi maisʔa no mohʦu ɗa eus eusno skaeu oʔu toveuʦa.
S.FORM: micu eu'sipeohʉ ho aiti isi eainca no koesi mais'a no mohcu la eus eusno skaeu o'u toveuca.
S.PHON: miʦu euʔsipeohɨ ho aiti isi eainʦa no koesi maisʔa no mohʦu ɗa eus eusno skaeu oʔu toveuʦa.
S.TRANSL: 那老人想, 我採的不是有兩籃嗎?

TRANSL.notes: (The old man thought) "Didn't it make two that I gathered?"

S.TRANSL: "Didn't it make two that I gathered?"

S.FORM: manci micu c'o anou cono skaeu 'e mo eon tan'e.
S.PHON: manʦi miʦu ʦʔo anou ʦono skaeu ʔe mo eon tanʔe.
S.FORM: manci micu c'o anou cono skaeu 'e mo eon tan'e.
S.PHON: manʦi miʦu ʦʔo anou ʦono skaeu ʔe mo eon tanʔe.
S.TRANSL: 怎麼只剩下一籃?
How come it remains just one basket?

S.FORM: ho uk'a eaeo si mo coni.
S.PHON: ho ukʔa eaeo si mo ʦoni.
S.FORM: ho uk'a eaeo si mo coni.
S.PHON: ho ukʔa eaeo si mo ʦoni.
S.TRANSL: 另一個是空的.
And the other one was empty.

S.FORM: isi cu aoka eu'i'ia 'o mo esmi ci mo tueu ci mo oko no hahocngʉ.
S.PHON: isi ʦu aoka euʔiʔia ʔo mo esmi ʦi mo tueu ʦi mo oko no hahoʦŋɨ.
S.FORM: isi cu aoka eu'i'ia 'o mo esmi ci mo tueu ci mo oko no hahocngʉ.
S.PHON: isi ʦu aoka euʔiʔia ʔo mo esmi ʦi mo tueu ʦi mo oko no hahoʦŋɨ.
S.TRANSL: 而且他仔細看那三個經過的男孩.
And he looked carefully at the three boys that arrived/passed.

S.FORM: mo 'so acʉhʉ tiatatviei to ihe ouhuhuca.
S.PHON: mo ʔso aʦɨhɨ tiatatviei to ihe ouhuhuʦa.
S.FORM: mo 'so acʉhʉ tiatatviei to ihe ouhuhuca.
S.PHON: mo ʔso aʦɨhɨ tiatatviei to ihe ouhuhuʦa.

TRANSL.notes: (那三個男孩)手上都拿著...邊走邊吃.

S.TRANSL: 手上都拿著...邊走邊吃.

TRANSL.notes: (The three boys) all hold.... (and) ate while walking.

S.TRANSL: all hold.... ate while walking.

S.FORM: mo hmʉhmʉskʉ to isi toveuca auka mi'usni ho eu'i'ia isi asna eainca no koesi hin'i na'na a peo'eoza 'o os'o toveuca nesoni.
S.PHON: mo hmɨhmɨskɨ to isi toveuʦa auka miʔusni ho euʔiʔia isi asna eainʦa no koesi hinʔi naʔna a peoʔeoza ʔo osʔo toveuʦa nesoni.
S.FORM: mo hmʉhmʉskʉ to isi toveuca auka mi'usni ho eu'i'ia isi asna eainca no koesi hin'i na'na a peo'eoza 'o os'o toveuca nesoni.
S.PHON: mo hmɨhmɨskɨ to isi toveuʦa auka miʔusni ho euʔiʔia isi asna eainʦa no koesi hinʔi naʔna a peoʔeoza ʔo osʔo toveuʦa nesoni.

TRANSL.notes: 他或許想他們已經偷他採的(水果).

S.TRANSL: 他或許想他們已經偷他採的 .

TRANSL.notes: He probably thought that they had stolen (the fruit) he gathered.

S.TRANSL: He probably thought that they had stolen he gathered.

S.FORM: mo mo maica 'e 'a'ausnusi.
S.PHON: mo mo maiʦa ʔe ʔaʔausnusi.
S.FORM: mo mo maica 'e 'a'ausnusi.
S.PHON: mo mo maiʦa ʔe ʔaʔausnusi.
S.TRANSL: 故事就是這樣.
It's the way things are.
